name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, maverick spending causes missed discounts. We provide a procurement analytics dashboard instead of manual tracking of invoices and expenses.
problem_solved: Maverick spending and missed savings opportunities
